title: Aura Tools
description: "A sleek 16x16 resource pack that redefines Minecraft tools! Featuring unique shapes for every tier—including a custom Copper set—Aura Tools brings a fresh, professional look to your survival world."
body:
Aura Tools is a lightweight yet impactful 16x16 resource pack designed to give your equipment a modern and refined silhouette. Instead of the standard blocky vanilla textures, this pack introduces custom shapes and a more professional color palette while staying true to the classic Minecraft performance.

💎 Key Features
Optimized 16x16 Textures: Designed to be performance-friendly while offering a completely new look.

Custom Tool Shapes: Unique silhouettes for Swords, Pickaxes, Axes, and Shovels to make your gear feel special.

Complete Tier Overhaul:

Netherite: Dark, heavy, and powerful appearance.

Diamond: Sharp, crystalline, and iconic.

Gold: Brilliant, high-contrast royal textures.

Iron: Clean, polished, and industrial.

Copper: A special rose-gold aesthetic for early-game flair.

Stone & Wood: Refined, clean shapes for a better starting experience.
